zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Beauchamp於1329年1月20日出生在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克時，他的父親Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset24歲，母親Margaret Porter25歲。他於大約1351年4月17日與Joan de Cherlelton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年2月14日在英國貝德福爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾維頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Beauchamp于1329年1月20日出生在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克时，他的父亲Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset24岁，母亲Margaret Porter25岁。他于大约1351年4月17日与Joan de Cherlelton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1389年2月14日在英国貝德福爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾維頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Beauchamp was born on 20 January 1329, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Porter, was 25. He married Joan de Cherlelton about 17 April 1351, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 February 1389, in Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Beauchamp est né le 20 janvier 1329, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Porter, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Cherlelton environ 17 avril 1351, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1389, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshir: St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Beauchamp am 20. Januar 1329 in Warwick, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Porter 25. Er hat um 17. April 1351 in England, United Kingdom Joan de Cherlelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1389 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England und wurde in St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Beauchamp è nato il il 20 gennaio 1329 nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Porter, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Cherlelton circa 17 aprile 1351, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1389, nel Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Beauchampが1329年1月20日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで生まれた時，父Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somersetは24歳，母Margaret Porterは25歳であった。約1351年4月17日にイギリスイギリスでJoan de Cherleltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1389年2月14日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルバートンスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshir: 영국 워윅실르 울버턴 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Beauchamp(이)가 1329년 1월 20일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Porter(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1351년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan de Cherlelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 2월 14일 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 울버턴 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.20 January 1329–14 Febuary 1389: 20 de janeiro de 1329–14 de fevereiro de 1389
pt.St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshir: St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Beauchamp nasceu em 20 de janeiro de 1329, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Porter, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Cherlelton aproximadamente 17 de abril de 1351, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1389, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshir: ст мэри'с чурч, волвиртон, варвиккшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Beauchamp родился 20 января 1329 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Porter, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Cherlelton около 17 апреля 1351 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1389 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, волвиртон, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Beauchamp nació el 20 de enero de 1329, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Porter, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan de Cherlelton aproximadamente 17 de abril de 1351, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1389, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Wolverton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
